intro: 做報告做到要寫遺書？救星來了！Google NotebookLM 這次大改版簡直不講武德，直接要把研究生和上班族從地獄超渡回來！
main_content: NotebookLM 這次底層直接升級成 Gemini 3.5，還加入黑科技，效能勝率狂飆！以前最討厭 AI 給答案像在通靈，現在它會把「透明思考推理步驟」一條條秀給你，再也不怕它瞎掰。最扯的是，以前整理完資料還要手動做簡報，現在一鍵就能直接幫你匯出成 Excel 和 PPT 簡報檔！小花我覺得，這根本是合法開掛、期末修仙爆肝的終極外掛啊！
outro: 一鍵生成 PPT 到底會多神？你最想拿它來應付什麼報告？留言區聊起來！記得訂閱小花，AI 科技情報不漏接喔！
visual_prompts: 2D anime style, visually stunning, a quirky girl tech blogger with pink hair and smart glasses looking dynamic and excited, pointing at a giant glowing holographic interface showing transparent data flowing and converting into professional PPT and Excel sheet floating icons, electric sparks, futuristic glowing workspace background, No text, no letters, no words

2D anime style, visually stunning, the anime girl cheering with tears of pure joy, holding a glowing digital notebook, surrounded by floating cascading geometric papers, folders, and graphs dissolving into neon light particles, vibrant cinematic lighting, No text, no letters, no words

news_sources.title: Google NotebookLM 大改版！升級Gemini 3.5 效能提升超有感，還能把研究成果直接轉成PPT 與Excel 檔案
